item.title: 🪼🪼🪼 LYSKOSTUME 🪼🪼🪼 〰〰〰〰〰 T.D. (Turritopsis-dohrnii /The Immortal Jelly Fish) Jus...
item.description:
@lilibethcuencarasmussen

🪼🪼🪼 LYSKOSTUME 🪼🪼🪼

〰〰〰〰〰
T.D.
(Turritopsis-dohrnii /The Immortal Jelly Fish)

Justine Boesen: accordion and vocal @justineboesen
Costume design: Stina Resting @stinaresting

Technical design: Thomas Kaufmanas @making.m0ti0n
Electronics technician: Rune Sahl Nielsen
Concept and performance: Lilibeth Cuenca Rasmussen @lilibethcuencarasmussen

〰〰〰〰〰
PERFORMANCE @lilibethcuencarasmussen
Borås Art Museum @boras_konstmuseum
March 28th, 2026
Time: 13.00
Duration: 30-40 minutes
〰〰〰〰〰

This performance work and costume design & production has been supportes by Statens Kunstfond - both by the Performing Arts and the Visual Arts @statenskunstfond

Thanks a lot for making this project a reality 💫

📸 Photo 2: Line Poulsen @venus_spejlet

#costumedesign #performingarts #visualarts #stinaresting #transformation
item.content:encoded:
@lilibethcuencarasmussen

🪼🪼🪼 LYSKOSTUME 🪼🪼🪼

〰〰〰〰〰
T.D.
(Turritopsis-dohrnii /The Immortal Jelly Fish)

Justine Boesen: accordion and vocal @justineboesen
Costume design: Stina Resting @stinaresting

Technical design: Thomas Kaufmanas @making.m0ti0n
Electronics technician: Rune Sahl Nielsen
Concept and performance: Lilibeth Cuenca Rasmussen @lilibethcuencarasmussen

〰〰〰〰〰
PERFORMANCE @lilibethcuencarasmussen
Borås Art Museum @boras_konstmuseum
March 28th, 2026
Time: 13.00
Duration: 30-40 minutes
〰〰〰〰〰

This performance work and costume design & production has been supportes by Statens Kunstfond - both by the Performing Arts and the Visual Arts @statenskunstfond

Thanks a lot for making this project a reality 💫

📸 Photo 2: Line Poulsen @venus_spejlet

#costumedesign #performingarts #visualarts #stinaresting #transformation
item.author: lilibethcuencarasmussen

item.title: Vi bjuder in till Turritopsis-dohrnii (The Immortal Jellyfish) – en helt ny perf...
item.description:
@lilibethcuencarasmussen

Vi bjuder in till Turritopsis-dohrnii (The Immortal Jellyfish) – en helt ny performance av Lilibeth Cuenca Rasmussen. 💫

📅 28 mars kl. 13.00
📍 Start i Borås Kulturhus foajé
Fri entré

I denna nyproducerade performance, skapad särskilt för Borås Konstmuseum, inspireras Cuenca Rasmussen av den lilla ”odödliga” maneten Turritopsis-dohrnii, vars unika förmåga att återgå till ett tidigare livsstadium ligger till grund för performancen.

Cuenca Rasmussen bär en specialdesignad kostym, utrustad med bland annat LED-teknik, och bjuder på en improviserad performance som sker i interaktion med både publik och konstverk i utställningen Tension, Please!, där hon medverkar.

Med sig har hon dragspelaren Justine Boesen.

Missa inte denna unika konstupplevelse!
Varmt välkomna!

Lilibeth Cuenca Rasmussen (f. 1970, Manila, Filippinerna) bor och arbetar i Köpenhamn.

—

We invite you to experience Turritopsis-dohrnii / Immortal Jellyfish – a newly produced performance by Lilibeth Cuenca Rasmussen. 💫

📅 March 28, 1:00 PM
📍 Starting in the foyer of the Cultural Centre, Borås
Free admission

Created especially for Borås Konstmuseum, this performance takes inspiration from the small “immortal” jellyfish Turritopsis-dohrnii, known for its remarkable ability to revert to an earlier stage of its life cycle. This unique regenerative process forms the conceptual basis of the work.

During the performance, Cuenca Rasmussen wears a specially designed costume incorporating LED technology and presents an improvised work that interacts with the audience and the artworks in the exhibition Tension, Please!, in which she also participates.

She is joined by accordionist Justine Boesen.

Don’t miss this unique art experience.
All are warmly welcome!

Lilibeth Cuenca Rasmussen (b. 1970, Manila, Philippines) lives and works in Copenhagen.

📸 Turritopsis-dohrnii / Immortal Jellyfish, Lilibeth Cuenca Rasmussen, 2026. Photo: Line Poulsen / Venusspejlet

#boråskonstmuseum #boråsartmusem #performance #lilibethcuencarasmussen contemporaryar

@lilibethcuencarasmussen

Vi bjuder in till Turritopsis-dohrnii (The Immortal Jellyfish) – en helt ny performance av Lilibeth Cuenca Rasmussen. 💫

📅 28 mars kl. 13.00
📍 Start i Borås Kulturhus foajé
Fri entré

I denna nyproducerade performance, skapad särskilt för Borås Konstmuseum, inspireras Cuenca Rasmussen av den lilla ”odödliga” maneten Turritopsis-dohrnii, vars unika förmåga att återgå till ett tidigare livsstadium ligger till grund för performancen.

Cuenca Rasmussen bär en specialdesignad kostym, utrustad med bland annat LED-teknik, och bjuder på en improviserad performance som sker i interaktion med både publik och konstverk i utställningen Tension, Please!, där hon medverkar.

Med sig har hon dragspelaren Justine Boesen.

Missa inte denna unika konstupplevelse!
Varmt välkomna!

Lilibeth Cuenca Rasmussen (f. 1970, Manila, Filippinerna) bor och arbetar i Köpenhamn.

—

We invite you to experience Turritopsis-dohrnii / Immortal Jellyfish – a newly produced performance by Lilibeth Cuenca Rasmussen. 💫

📅 March 28, 1:00 PM
📍 Starting in the foyer of the Cultural Centre, Borås
Free admission

Created especially for Borås Konstmuseum, this performance takes inspiration from the small “immortal” jellyfish Turritopsis-dohrnii, known for its remarkable ability to revert to an earlier stage of its life cycle. This unique regenerative process forms the conceptual basis of the work.

During the performance, Cuenca Rasmussen wears a specially designed costume incorporating LED technology and presents an improvised work that interacts with the audience and the artworks in the exhibition Tension, Please!, in which she also participates.

She is joined by accordionist Justine Boesen.

Don’t miss this unique art experience.
All are warmly welcome!

Lilibeth Cuenca Rasmussen (b. 1970, Manila, Philippines) lives and works in Copenhagen.

📸 Turritopsis-dohrnii / Immortal Jellyfish, Lilibeth Cuenca Rasmussen, 2026. Photo: Line Poulsen / Venusspejlet

#boråskonstmuseum #boråsartmusem #performance #lilibethcuencarasmussen contemporaryar
item.author: lilibethcuencarasmussen

item.title: Sugar Balance is a project exploring consumption, labor,nature, and the fragile ...
item.description:
@lilibethcuencarasmussen

Sugar Balance is a project exploring consumption, labor,nature, and the fragile state of balance. From the sugar fields to the people who shape the process, we follow movement, energy, and the stories formed between land and body.

Artists:
@manny_montelibano
@lilibethcuencarasmussen

Special thanks
@orangeproject_ph
@statenskunstfond
@abungalowproject
@oca_norway
@adjiedu
@sayeh_22theater
item.content:encoded:
@lilibethcuencarasmussen

Sugar Balance is a project exploring consumption, labor,nature, and the fragile state of balance. From the sugar fields to the people who shape the process, we follow movement, energy, and the stories formed between land and body.

@lilibethcuencarasmussen
